span.p:
Worker URL stored in job record.
RemoteJobCompletionService polls
GET /jobs/{job_id}/status every 10s.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
R-001: Strict guard — if ANY artifact
fails to download, entire job fails.
GPU: Staggered retry (10/30/60/120s)
on 502/503 before marking failed.
